product.title: REDRAGON K535 APAS PRO RGB WIRELESS/WIRED MECHANICAL KEYBOARD
product.body_html:
The Redragon K535 APAS PRO RGB mechanical gaming keyboard has everything you need to get an edge when playing games. Due to its slim design with 104 detachable low-profile switches, it is not only compact and comfortable to use, but also versatile in terms of customization. This full-size keyboard is very easy to connect to a personal computer, thanks to the extremely fast detachable USB-C to USB cable. The keyboard has keys with LED RGB lighting, which you can adjust to your liking. The double-injected keys ensure that the light passes well enough and the keys are durable enough to last a long time during use. The keyboard is resistant to spills of liquids.

Features:

  • The connection can be wired with a cable, or via Bluetooth or via a 2.4GHz wireless connection with the included USB dongle
  • Slim housing with quality metal plate
  • Extremely low profile and detachable mechanical switch
  • Thin double-injected caps
  • RGB backlight
  • Removable USB-C to USB cable
  • Resistant to liquid spills
  • US layout

Specifications:

  • Color: Black
  • Number of keys: 104 mechanical keys
  • Lighting: RGB
  • Interface: USB-C to USB
